description: Detects throw statements inside extern "C" blocks -- exceptions cannot cross C linkage boundaries. Simplified from Rust: flags all throw_statement nodes (error severity) without checking for enclosing extern C context. Higher false-positive rate -- all throws are flagged, not just those in extern "C" blocks. NOLINT suppression and try-catch severity downgrade are not supported in the JSON DSL.

flag.message: throw statement detected -- verify this is not inside an extern "C" block (exceptions cannot propagate across C linkage boundaries)
